title: lilium × elegans
intro: Lilium × elegans, also known as the Casa Blanca lily or the Asiatic lily, is a hybrid plant of the lily family (Liliaceae) that has been bred for its large, fragrant flowers. The plant contains compounds like linalool and geraniol, which are known for their medicinal properties, including their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lilium × elegans include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality due to its calming and sedative properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
